{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Striker's slash
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Striker's slash]] is a technique where [[madra]] is poured to sever objects at a distance.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c1">''Soulsmith'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
